mapper.insert: insert into lego_evaluation_runs (id, evaluation_id, status, input) values (#{id}, #{evaluationId}, #{status}, cast(#{inputJson} as jsonb))
mapper.update: update lego_evaluation_runs set status = 'RUNNING', started_at = now(), finished_at = null, error = null where id = #{runId}
update lego_evaluation_runs set status = 'SUCCEEDED', metrics = cast(#{metricsJson} as jsonb), trace = cast(#{traceJson} as jsonb), finished_at = now() where id = #{runId}
update lego_evaluation_runs set status = 'FAILED', error = #{error}, finished_at = now() where id = #{runId}
mapper.select: select id, evaluation_id, status, cast(input as text) as input_json, cast(metrics as text) as metrics_json, cast(trace as text) as trace_json, error, started_at, finished_at, created_at from lego_evaluation_runs where id = #{id}
